$comment: Architecture contract for arcade-guard. Copy to your repo root as architecture.spec.json (or run `guard.py init --template hexagonal`) and edit the `match` globs to fit your layout. Conformance is checked deterministically from these globs + the dependency edges. 'from'/'to' match a component name OR a layer name.
intent: Hexagonal/ports-and-adapters: the domain core is pure; adapters and UI depend inward toward the domain, never the reverse.

forbid.why: UI must not reach adapters/persistence directly
